title: Title
slogan: This is the slogan for the hero section.

hero.subtitle: At SEO Agency Melbourne, we help clients promote their business online and achieve real growth. Our team of experts collaborates with you to craft unique strategies that expand your digital footprint and deliver measurable results.

services.title: Our
services.subtitle: Everything you need to grow your business online — under one roof.
services.card1Desc: Show up where your customers are searching. Track every click.
services.card2Desc: Targeted social ads that drive real conversions and brand awareness.
services.card3Desc: Reach highly engaged audiences. Built for maximum short-form impact.
services.card4Desc: Own your audience. Turn followers into leads and leads into sales.
services.card5Desc: Rank for searches that drive traffic and revenue. Long-term results.
services.card6Desc: Nurture your customers. Drive repeat purchases with precision.

serviceGrid.title: Full-Funnel Growth Solutions
serviceGrid.subtitle: Hover for details · Click to learn more
serviceGrid.card1Desc: From account strategy to performance optimization, build a sustainable social media system where every post works for the brand.
serviceGrid.card2Desc: From landing page design to SEO optimization, connect the full ecommerce conversion funnel and turn traffic into real revenue.
serviceGrid.card3Desc: From brand visuals to video production, use creativity to drive emotional connection and make your brand impossible to ignore.
serviceGrid.card4Desc: Owned channels with the highest ROI. From design and copy to automation, turn your email list into a consistent revenue engine.
serviceGrid.card5Desc: Conversion-first website design. Every button placement and every line of copy is shaped by conversion logic.
serviceGrid.card6Desc: Targeted campaigns across Meta and Xiaohongshu to acquire higher-quality customers with smarter budget allocation.

process.title: Your Ambition.
process.subtitle: A proven four-step framework that turns your goals into clear strategies, disciplined execution, and measurable growth.
process.summaryLine1: Conversion-focused systems built to create measurable growth.
process.summaryLine2: A clear process helps turn creative execution into business outcomes.
process.step1Desc: Analyze brand positioning, target audience, and current performance to establish a clear baseline.
process.step2Desc: Develop tailored marketing and content strategies aligned with your business objectives.
process.step3Desc: Implement campaigns across platforms with structured workflows and disciplined execution.
process.step4Desc: Monthly reporting, strategy refinement, and continuous improvement based on real data.

contact.sectionSubtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll get back to you shortly.
